title: 3 Way Terminal Split
main_idea: Allow splitting the secondary terminal into 2.
reason: I normally find my normal workflow being the agent on the left, the app running on bottom right, and a terminal for other activity like pushing git etc in top right.
requirements: Can split the secondary terminal in the opposite direction of the existing split
Keyboard shortcuts just to switch to this view from the first.  Should not have to split twice, but can if wanted.
Should have shortcuts to smartly switch the layouts. Swap left and right panels, swap internal secondary panels.  we aren't moving the main agent panel into a smaller split.
Should all be persisted the way the other terminals are now
ui_notes: A drag handle to resize would be nice between splits
